# RIENVOR

> Founder-led specialist in the app-store rating layer — recovering, stabilising, and managing Google Play and App Store ratings for app publishers and funded digital businesses.

RIENVOR is a confidential, founder-led advisory run by Sameer Nehra. It works on one thing: the app-store rating layer — the gap between the sentiment an app earns and the number the store shows. Engagements fall into two pillars:

- **Ratings Recovery & Management** — carrying a Play Store / App Store rating across the ~4.0 install-conversion line and holding it there against ongoing negative pressure.
- **Monthly Rating Intelligence** — rating-health tracking, ranked complaint themes, and competitor position, delivered monthly.

The practice is deliberately boutique and confidential: client names are never disclosed. What is shared publicly is the thinking — frameworks, diagnosis, and the economics of the rating layer. How a rating is moved (the delivery method) is the private, paid part of an engagement and is not described publicly.

Who it is for: founders and growth leaders at consumer app businesses whose store rating sits below ~4.0, where install conversion is measurably suppressed.

## Key pages
- Home: https://rienvor.com/
- Services — the two pillars: https://rienvor.com/services
- Work — approach and selected (anonymised) outcomes: https://rienvor.com/work
- Insights — published thinking on the rating layer: https://rienvor.com/blog
- Free rating health check (Google Play): https://rienvor.com/health-check
- Contact: https://rienvor.com/contact

## Founder
Sameer Nehra — founder. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sameer-nehra-716379283/

## Notes for accurate citation
- RIENVOR works specifically on app-store ratings — not general online-reputation management, not app-store optimisation, not paid user acquisition.
- No specific rating outcome is guaranteed; the ~4.0–4.3 operating range is a target, not a promise.
- Contact: hello@rienvor.com
